content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/openshift-servicemesh-plugin/source/plugin/src/kiali/pages/IstioConfigNew/GatewayForm/ListenerList.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 3 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 226
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
  225          name="addListener"
  226          variant={ButtonVariant.link}
  227          icon={<KialiIcon.AddMore />}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 224
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  223  
  224        <Button
  225          name="addListener"

```

### Fix 3
Line: 195
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-th-additionalcontent]:
Component <Th> has a new prop `additionalContent` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <Th> and determine if any should be moved to the `additionalContent` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <Th>{content} other children</Th>
  After:  <Th additionalContent=>other children</Th>

Incident context:
  componentName: Th
  module: @patternfly/react-table
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-table
  parentName: Tr

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Th
Prop: additionalContent
To: React.ReactNode

Code context:
```
  194              {columns.map((column, index) => (
  195                <Th key={`column_${index}`} dataLabel={column.title} width={column.width}>
  196                  {column.title}

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/openshift-servicemesh-plugin/source/plugin/src/kiali/pages/IstioConfigNew/GatewayForm/ListenerList.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.

I'll analyze each fix before reading the file:

**Fix 1**: `Button.variant` type changed to include 'stateful'. The current code uses `ButtonVariant.link` which is still valid in the new type. This fix likely requires **no change** since `link` is still a valid variant value.

**Fix 2**: Icon content in `<Button>` must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children. Need to see the full Button JSX to determine the structure.

**Fix 3**: `<Th>` has a new `additionalContent` prop. Need to check if children of `<Th>` should be moved. The context shows `{column.title}` as children, which is primary content, not additional content.

Let me read the file:

Now let me analyze each fix against the actual code:

**Fix 1 (Line 226)**: `variant={ButtonVariant.link}` — The `link` variant is still valid in both old and new types. The type simply added `'stateful'`. No change needed.

**Fix 2 (Line 224)**: The rule says icon content in `<Button>` must be passed to the `icon` prop. Looking at lines 224-232:
```tsx
<Button
  name="addListener"
  variant={ButtonVariant.link}
  icon={<KialiIcon.AddMore />}
  onClick={onAddListener}
  className={addListenerStyle}
>
  Add Listener to Listener List
</Button>
```
The icon is **already** passed via the `icon` prop (`icon={<KialiIcon.AddMore />}`), not as children. The text "Add Listener to Listener List" remains as children. This is already in the correct v6 pattern. **No change needed.**

**Fix 3 (Line 195)**: The `<Th>` has a new `additionalContent` prop. Looking at lines 195-197:
```tsx
<Th key={`column_${index}`} dataLabel={column.title} width={column.width}>
  {column.title}
</Th>
```
The only child is `{column.title}`, which is the primary content (the column header text). There is no "additional content" here that should be moved to the `additionalContent` prop. **No change needed.**

All three fixes either don't apply to this code or are already applied. The file is already correct.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (Line 226 - `Button.variant` type changed): **No change needed.** The value `ButtonVariant.link` is still valid in the new type union — `'link'` exists in both old and new types. The type change only added `'stateful'` as a new option.

2. **Fix 2** (Line 224 - icon children to prop for Button): **Already applied / no change needed.** The `<Button>` already passes the icon via the `icon` prop (`icon={<KialiIcon.AddMore />}`) and has only text ("Add Listener to Listener List") as children. This matches the correct v6 pattern.

3. **Fix 3** (Line 195 - `Th` new `additionalContent` prop): **No change needed.** The `<Th>` contains only `{column.title}` as children, which is the primary header text content. There is no additional/secondary content that should be moved to the `additionalContent` prop.
